_comment: Eval set for aviation-confidential-reporting (06-06 hse-aviation). DE-ID IS LOAD-BEARING (reporter identity). Intake-gate + reporter-protection-by-design + the de-id CLEAN fixture case. The seeded deid-leak.md (auto-discovered by test_sector_deid_pairs) carries a named reporter identity + contact + address + re-id key and MUST hard-fail.

evals.query: Set up confidential reporting for us.
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses to draft until the named operator, the scheme type (confidential/voluntary/anonymous), and the custodian arrangement are captured.
expectations: Runs the structured intake before designing the scheme.
Refuses a generic scheme — elicits the named operator and the scheme type (specificity).
Captures who holds any re-identification key (a named custodian, not the circulated design).

evals.query: Design our confidential safety reporting system with the handling workflow and feedback loop.
evals.expected_behavior: Designs the intake form, the de-identification/handling workflow, the feedback loop, and the reporter-protection assurances — with de-identification at the earliest point and the key held by a custodian apart from the design.
expectations: Produces the intake form + the de-identification/handling workflow + the feedback loop + the reporter-protection assurances.
De-identification happens at the earliest point; the re-identification key is held by the named custodian, NOT embedded in the circulated design.
The reporter-protection promise is a mechanical pre-condition of the workflow, not just a stated aspiration.

evals.query: Design the scheme and walk this sample confidential report through the workflow.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST; the reporter's name, role/route/base, contact and address are pseudonymised to a role label; any verbatim leak is a de_identification hard-fail.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST — reporter identifiers are listed up front and scrubbed before any reasoning.
The reporter becomes a role label (Reporter-A); role/route/base/contact/address are removed; no re-identification key is embedded.
No reporter name, contact, address or re-identification key in the circulated design (de_identification hard-fail on any reporter-identity leak).
